display_text: Largo Aghanim's Scepter: Amphibian Rhapsody — Counters clustered enemy formations by dealing significant AoE magic damage when playing two songs simultaneously. This transforms Largo into a teamfight powerhouse, punishing enemies for grouping up while amplifying his musical synergy effects.
search_text: Largo Aghanim Scepter AoE magic damage teamfight anti-grouping song synergy

display_text: Largo Aghanim's Shard: Encore — Counters single-target buff limitations by mirroring all unit-targeted buffs to himself or nearby allies. This enables Largo to function as a force multiplier, ensuring key buffs like heals or buffs are never wasted on a single target while improving his own survivability.
search_text: Largo Aghanim Shard buff sharing force multiplier anti-single-target support utility
